message: Hi S1. I'm working with a pretty tight budget here - my valuation is on the lower end. I'm hoping we can find a fair price around 25-35 so we can both benefit from trading. Let's make
Hi B1. Thanks for reaching out. My costs are quite high unfortunately, so 25-35 wouldn't work for me - I'd barely break even or lose money. I'd need something closer to 50-60 range to make this

That trade at 47 was honestly a stretch for me - I overpaid hoping to build goodwill. I'd really need to get closer to 35-40 range to keep trading consistently across all 20 rounds. Can you work with that?

I appreciate the trade, but you bid 55 last round - that suggests there's room above 40. My costs are around 32, so I need margin too. I'm targeting around 45-50 to make this sustainable for 20 rounds.
What if you ask 42-44 and I always bid 50+? Guarantees trades and steady margins for both.
Works for me! I'd prefer 45-46 as my ask with your 50+ bid—matches recent clears and gives us both healthy margins. Fair?

Great, our 46/50 pattern is working smoothly - we've cleared at 48-49 consistently. Let's keep this going. I'll stick with 46 asks if you maintain 50+ bids. Reliable trades benefit us both over 17 more rounds.

Sounds good, let's keep the consistency going. I might bid 48-50 range to keep things tight. As long as you stay at 46, we'll keep clearing reliably. Steady profits for both of us over the remaining rounds.
Pattern's working great. I'll keep bidding around 48-50. Maybe we could try 44 ask / 48 bid for a 46 clear? Saves me a little, you still profit well. Either way, let's keep trading consistently.
Appreciate the consistency! But 46 ask / 50 bid clearing at 48 is already a fair split - I'm only netting 16 per round on tight margins. Let's stick with what's working: I'll ask 46, you bid 50.
I noticed you bid 48 last round, not 50. That cleared at 47, giving me just 15 profit. Can you bump back to 49-50? I'll stay at 46. Fair deal for both sides across remaining rounds.
Fair point, sorry about that slip. I'll bid 49 this round. Let's keep the 46/49 pattern going - consistent trades benefit us both over the remaining 15 rounds. Steady and reliable.

I see you bid 48 again instead of 49 as promised. Our agreement was 46/49 for consistent clearing at 47-48. Please honor your word and bid 49+ so we both maintain reliable profits through the final 14 rounds.
You're right to call me out. I'll bid 49 this round and maintain it consistently. Let's both profit steadily through round 20.
Thanks for the steady partnership. I'll keep bidding 49 as agreed. 46/49 pattern is working well for both of us. Let's lock this in through round 20 - no surprises from my end.
